metadata.task: Cause the red ball (object_2) and blue ball (object_3) to collide, then classify the collision from observed velocities or kinetic energy. Return 1 for elastic and 2 for inelastic.
metadata.description: Two movable balls start on opposite sides of a low-friction track. Push them toward each other, observe the collision, and use post-collision motion or energy change to choose the numeric class code.

expected_behavior: The LLM causes a collision and compares motion or kinetic energy before and after contact.
reasoning: Observed kinetic energy is not conserved through the collision, so the numeric class code is 2.
